## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Tavrn's content strategy, review progress, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pedro approved several blog topics, emphasizing preference for educational, thought leadership content in legal tech](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Writing tone needs adjustment: less casual, more professional/neutral (akin to Investopedia)](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [SEO audit revealed issues (e.g., white H1 tag); web dev contact shared for fixes](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard set up to track Tavrn's visibility in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Pedro approved blogs on AI tools, legal practice areas, and state-specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Preference for educational content drawing from credible data sources](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Suggested new content idea: high-profile legal cases (e.g., Camp Lejeune) with admin perspective](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Steering away from broad topics like HIPAA or general AI in legal space](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Writing Style Feedback

  - [Current blog draft deemed too casual and consumer-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Requested more clinical, neutral tone; less "you" framing](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Subheaders too action-oriented; prefer more neutral, educational approach](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Aim for "neutral B2B, fancy but not too much" - similar to Investopedia or Robinhood's educational content](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### SEO Audit & Technical Issues

  - [Dave (Managing Director) conducted SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Critical issue: white H1 tag on blog (spam indicator for Google)](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Pedro shared web developer's email for direct communication on fixes](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Site redesign in progress, will address some current issues](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

### Analytics Access

  - [Team needs access to Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - Correct email for access: <team@growthxlabs.com>

### Scrunch Dashboard Introduction

  - [New tool measuring Tavrn's visibility in various LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claw, AI, Confused)](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Dashboard shows competitive presence, brand mentions](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Customizable prompts based on industry queries or common sales questions](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Currently low visibility due to startup status; expected to improve with content publication](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Revise writing guidelines based on Pedro's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Rework the sample blog post with adjusted tone and style](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Generate new content ideas focusing on high-profile legal cases](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Grant GrowthX team access to Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Connect GrowthX team with Tavrn's web developer for SEO fixes](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Scrunch dashboard for visibility improvements](https://fathom.video/share/3EGxmEJagTCjy3sTcTXse-WJkfPCcycW?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
